This tranquil shrine offers a peaceful escape from the bustling city, inviting visitors to immerse themselves in nature's splendor. Stroll through the grounds and enjoy the delicate petals dancing in the breeze.

Best visited during the cherry blossom season, when the shrine is adorned with vibrant pink hues, creating a picturesque backdrop for your travel memories. Don't miss the chance to capture stunning photos and experience the serene atmosphere that this sacred site provides.
若宮八幡神社.address: 大分県豊後高田市高田2863-14
若宮八幡神社.access_car: 10 minutes from the nearest highway exit

開聞山麓交誼公園.desc:
Nestled at the foot of the majestic Kaimondake, Kaimondake Sanroku Kōgien is a floral paradise waiting to be explored. With vibrant blooms painting the landscape, this park offers a stunning backdrop for leisurely strolls and photography.

Visit during the peak blooming season to witness a breathtaking array of flowers, making it a perfect escape for nature lovers and families alike.
開聞山麓交誼公園.address: 鹿児島県指宿市開聞十町2626

東雲之里 (あじさい園).tagline: Discover a Colorful World of Hydrangeas!
東雲之里 (あじさい園).desc:
Nestled in the serene landscapes of Shinonome No Sato, this enchanting garden bursts into a vibrant display of hydrangeas each year. As you stroll through the pathways lined with these stunning blooms, you’ll find yourself immersed in a sea of colors, from deep blues to soft pinks. It’s a perfect spot for photography enthusiasts and nature lovers alike, offering countless opportunities to capture the beauty of these flowers in full bloom. 

Whether you’re seeking a peaceful retreat or a picturesque backdrop for your next adventure, Shinonome No Sato is a must-visit destination during the blooming season. 

Make sure to plan your visit from late June to mid-July to witness the hydrangeas at their finest!
東雲之里 (あじさい園).fee: 大人 500 円 (僅花期收取)
東雲之里 (あじさい園).address: 鹿児島県出水市上大川内2881
東雲之里 (あじさい園).access_car: 10 minutes from the nearest highway exit

大隅湖 (高隈水壩).tagline: Experience Nature's Canvas at Osumi Ko!
大隅湖 (高隈水壩).desc:
Nestled in the stunning landscape of Takakuma Dam, Osumi Ko is a breathtaking destination for flower lovers. The vibrant blooms create a picturesque scene that changes with the seasons, making it a perfect spot for photography and relaxation.

Visit during the peak flowering period to witness the stunning array of colors that blanket the area. Whether you're strolling along the lakeside or enjoying a picnic with friends, Osumi Ko offers a serene escape into nature's beauty.
大隅湖 (高隈水壩).address: 鹿児島県鹿屋市上高隈町
大隅湖 (高隈水壩).access_train: Take the JR Nippō Main Line to Osumi Ko Station, then a short bus ride.
大隅湖 (高隈水壩).access_car: Approximately 30 minutes from the nearest expressway exit.

本興寺.desc:
Nestled in the heart of the city, Honkōji offers a serene escape where cherry blossoms bloom in breathtaking splendor.

Visit during late March to early April to witness the stunning sakura in full glory, creating a picturesque backdrop for your peaceful retreat. Whether you're seeking a quiet moment of reflection or a perfect photo opportunity, Honkōji is a must-visit destination for flower enthusiasts and nature lovers alike.
本興寺.fee: 大人 500 円 (僅紫陽花祭期間)
本興寺.address: 石川県金沢市薬師町ロ75
本興寺.access_train: A short walk from the nearest station

足羽神社.desc:
Asuwa Jinja is a hidden gem where cherry blossoms bloom in a breathtaking display. The tranquil atmosphere invites visitors to relax and soak in the beauty of nature.

Stroll through the shrine grounds, where the delicate petals create a picturesque setting perfect for photography and reflection. This enchanting spot is a must-visit for anyone seeking a peaceful escape in the heart of the city.
足羽神社.address: 福井県福井市足羽1丁目8-25

あじさいロード (福井市).tagline: A Colorful Journey Through Nature's Beauty!
あじさいロード (福井市).desc:
Ajisai Rōdo in Fukui City is a stunning pathway lined with vibrant hydrangeas, creating a picturesque scene that enchants visitors. Stroll along this floral avenue, where the blossoms bloom in a breathtaking array of colors, making it a perfect spot for photography and relaxation. The gentle fragrance and serene atmosphere invite you to immerse yourself in nature's artistry.

Whether you're a flower enthusiast or just looking for a peaceful escape, Ajisai Rōdo offers a delightful experience that rejuvenates the spirit. Don't miss the chance to witness this floral wonderland during the blooming season!
あじさいロード (福井市).address: 福井県福井市狐橋1丁目〜東下野町

樂山公園.tagline: Discover Nature's Palette at Rakusai Koen!
樂山公園.desc:
Rakusai Koen is a stunning destination where nature comes alive with vibrant colors. Visit during the blooming season to experience breathtaking views of seasonal flowers that paint the landscape in hues of pink, yellow, and purple. Perfect for a leisurely stroll or a picnic with family and friends, this park offers a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of city life. Don't forget your camera; the picturesque scenery is a photographer's dream!

Whether you're a flower enthusiast or just looking for a peaceful retreat, Rakusai Koen is a must-visit spot that showcases the beauty of Japan's natural flora.

塩田平紫陽花小道 (あじさい小道).tagline: Discover a Hidden Pathway of Vibrant Hydrangeas!
塩田平紫陽花小道 (あじさい小道).desc:
Nestled in the serene landscape of Shiodan Daira, the Ajisai Komichi is a charming path lined with stunning hydrangeas. As you stroll along this picturesque trail, you'll be enveloped by a kaleidoscope of colors, making it a perfect spot for photography and peaceful reflection.

Visit during late June to mid-July to witness the hydrangeas in full bloom, transforming the pathway into a breathtaking floral wonderland. Whether you're a nature lover or simply seeking a tranquil escape, Ajisai Komichi offers a delightful experience that will leave you enchanted.
塩田平紫陽花小道 (あじさい小道).access_train: Accessible via local train; a short walk from the nearest station.
塩田平紫陽花小道 (あじさい小道).access_car: Parking available nearby for those driving.

飯山城址公園.desc:
Nestled in the heart of Iiyama, Iiyama Jōshi Kōen offers a stunning blend of historical significance and natural beauty. The park is built around the ruins of Iiyama Castle, providing a picturesque backdrop for cherry blossoms in spring.

Visit during late April to early May to witness the breathtaking sakura in full bloom, creating a magical atmosphere that draws visitors from near and far. Whether you're a history buff or a nature lover, this park promises a delightful experience.
飯山城址公園.access_train: A short walk from Iiyama Station on the Nagano Shinkansen line.
飯山城址公園.access_car: Approximately 15 minutes from the Iiyama Interchange on the Joshinetsu Expressway.

鶴舞公園.period: late March to early April, late April to early May
鶴舞公園.tagline: Discover a Floral Wonderland in the Heart of the City!
鶴舞公園.desc:
Tsuruma is a stunning park that bursts into color during the blooming season. With its vibrant cherry blossoms and a variety of seasonal flowers, it’s a perfect escape for nature lovers and photographers alike. Stroll along the picturesque paths, enjoy a picnic under the trees, or simply soak in the beauty of the landscape.

Visit during late March to early April for the cherry blossoms, and from late April to early May for the azaleas. Each season offers a unique floral display that will leave you enchanted!
鶴舞公園.address: 愛知県名古屋市昭和区鶴舞1

太江寺.desc:
Nestled in the serene landscapes of Japan, Taieiji is a hidden gem that bursts into color during the blooming season. This enchanting temple offers a peaceful escape where you can immerse yourself in the beauty of nature.

As the flowers bloom, the surroundings transform into a picturesque scene, perfect for leisurely strolls and capturing stunning photographs. Whether you are a nature lover or seeking a moment of reflection, Taieiji provides a tranquil backdrop for all visitors.
太江寺.address: 三重県伊勢市二見町江1659
太江寺.access_car: 10 minutes from the nearest highway exit

大慈寺.desc:
Nestled in the heart of nature, Daijiji offers a serene escape where cherry blossoms bloom in stunning abundance. Visit during the peak season to witness the breathtaking sight of delicate pink petals dancing in the breeze.

Stroll through the temple grounds, where each corner reveals a new perspective of these beautiful flowers. Capture the essence of spring as you immerse yourself in the peaceful atmosphere and enjoy the harmonious blend of nature and spirituality.
大慈寺.address: 三重県志摩市大王町波切409
大慈寺.access_car: 10 minutes from the nearest highway exit

饒平名紫陽花園 (よへなあじさい園).tagline: Discover a Sea of Color at Yoheina Ajisai En!
饒平名紫陽花園 (よへなあじさい園).desc:
Nestled in the heart of Okinawa, Yoheina Ajisai En is a breathtaking garden that showcases a stunning variety of hydrangeas. With over 10,000 blooms in vibrant hues, this floral paradise is a feast for the eyes and a perfect spot for photography enthusiasts. Wander through the winding paths and immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of these delicate flowers.

Visit during the peak season to experience the garden in full bloom, where the air is filled with the sweet scent of hydrangeas. Whether you're a nature lover or simply looking for a peaceful escape, Yoheina Ajisai En offers a serene retreat that will leave you enchanted.
饒平名紫陽花園 (よへなあじさい園).fee: 大人 500 円 / 中高生 200 円
饒平名紫陽花園 (よへなあじさい園).address: 沖縄県国頭郡本部町伊豆味1312

見歸之瀑.desc:
Mikui No Taki is a breathtaking waterfall nestled in the heart of nature. The serene surroundings and the sound of cascading water create a perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life. Enjoy a peaceful hike to the falls, where you can immerse yourself in the beauty of the landscape and take stunning photos.

Visit during the best time to experience the vibrant colors of the changing seasons, making it a picturesque spot year-round.
見歸之瀑.fee: 免費 (紫陽花祭期間需支付環境維護費：大人 500 円)
見歸之瀑.address: 佐賀県唐津市相知町伊岐佐
見歸之瀑.access_train: Take the train to the nearest station and enjoy a scenic walk to the waterfall.
見歸之瀑.access_car: Easily accessible by car with parking available nearby.
